accomplishment_projects.title: Always On: Out of Home Lives
accomplishment_projects.description: In 2014, I led FF's delivery of a study for FEPE, the global association for the Out of Home advertising industry, to understand what it takes for OOH media to cut through and engage in the 'mobile first' era. One of the largest studies of its kind, the project developed a new OOH segmentation drawing on original quant research (6000+ consumers in the largest cities in the UK, Germany, Spain, Turkey, Brazil and South Africa) and innovative qual via FF's global trendspotter network.
